# defectdojo_user (Data Source)

Data source for Defect Dojo User. You can specify either the `id` or the `username` to look up the User.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Lookup by username
data "defectdojo_user" "example" {
  username = "admin"
}

# Or lookup by ID
# data "defectdojo_user" "by_id" {
#   id = "1"
# }
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) Identifier
- `username` (String) The username of the User. Specify either id or username.

### Read-Only

- `email` (String) The email address of the User
- `first_name` (String) The first name of the User
- `is_active` (Boolean) Whether this user account is active
- `is_superuser` (Boolean) Whether this user has all permissions without explicitly assigning them
- `last_name` (String) The last name of the User
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The password for the User (write-only, never returned by API)
